cues: A captured incident protects three things: your people, your site, and you.
Welcome to the Incidents, Injuries and Near-Misses guide.
Watch with the app open. Find your job on the pyramid.
The site manager captures and investigates — the area manager can too.
The area manager verifies the action and signs it off.
SHEQ reviews and closes it out.
The one rule: every incident is recorded.
Serious ones — or a dangerous occurrence — go to the Department of Labour.
Next, start here: capture a report.

segmentText.why_open: Every shift, real things happen on the floor — a slip, a cut, a near miss.
segmentText.why_act: What you do next matters. Capture it — quickly, honestly.
segmentText.why_prevent: It stops a small problem today from becoming a serious one tomorrow.
segmentText.why_proof: When the law needs answers, the proof is already there — complete, and on time.
segmentText.why_cta: That's what this guide is for. Let's walk through it.
